subcodes.first_line: O thou who rejoicest in the glad-tidings of God! In every age and century, the Dayspring of the world is made manifest
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستبشر ببشارات الله در هر عصر و قرنی مطلع آفاق بتجلی خاصی مشرق و لائح و
subcodes.subjects: @oneness; unity of religion, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
